mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.ORG_ID , A.ORGNM , B.DEPT_CD , B.DEPTNM , D.USER_ID , C.USER_ID , F.USER_AUTHRT_ID AS USER_TYPE , F.AUTHRT_GRPNM AS USER_TYPE_NM , C.USERNM , '' AS ADM_TYPE , '' AS MNG_TYPE FROM TB_LMS_ORG A INNER JOIN TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD B ON (A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.USEYN = 'Y') INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON (A.ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID AND B.DEPT_CD = C.DEPT_CD) INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON (C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID) INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT E ON (C.USER_ID = E.USER_ID) INNER JOIN TB_SYS_AUTH_GRP F ON (E.USER_AUTHRT_ID = F.USER_AUTHRT_ID) WHERE D.ADMIN_LOGIN_ACPT_DIV_CD = 'ACNT' AND (D.ACNT_LEAVE_DTTM IS NULL OR D.ACNT_LEAVE_DTTM = '')

SELECT DISTINCT A.ORG_ID , A.ORGNM , B.DEPT_CD , B.DEPTNM , D.USER_ID , C.USER_ID , F.USER_AUTHRT_ID AS USER_TYPE , F.AUTHRT_GRPNM AS USER_TYPE_NM , C.USERNM , '' AS ADM_TYPE , '' AS MNG_TYPE FROM TB_LMS_ORG A INNER JOIN TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD B ON (A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.USEYN = 'Y') INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON (A.ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID AND B.DEPT_CD = C.DEPT_CD) INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON (C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID) INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT E ON (C.USER_ID = E.USER_ID) INNER JOIN TB_SYS_AUTH_GRP F ON (E.USER_AUTHRT_ID = F.USER_AUTHRT_ID) WHERE D.ADMIN_LOGIN_ACPT_DIV_CD = 'ACNT' AND (D.ACNT_LEAVE_DTTM IS NULL OR D.ACNT_LEAVE_DTTM = '') AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND B.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND F.USER_AUTHRT_ID = #{userType}
